title: carpinus betulus var. typica
intro: Carpinus betulus var. typica, also known as the common hornbeam or European hornbeam, is a deciduous tree native to Europe and Western Asia, characterized by its gray bark and ovate leaves with double-toothed margins. The medicinal properties of Carpinus betulus var. typica include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Carpinus betulus var. typica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
